nodes.label: AI as tool for overcoming creative block
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a terrific way of becoming 'unstuck'

nodes.label: AI as scheduling assistant for complex logistics
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really approach AI when stuck creatively, but rather when stuck in terms of something logistical

nodes.label: AI as second opinion for critical decisions
nodes.label_negative: AI as overly eager to please without critique
nodes.grounding_span: AI models are overly eager to please, and so I don't fully trust the model to be sufficiently critical

nodes.label: AI as time-saving placeholder
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of creative stagnation
nodes.grounding_span: I can move on from something that might have had me stuck for quite some time

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to human creativity
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool, very much like the internet. While it can be abused, this will not be at the cost of human creativity

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: I can move on from something that might have had me stuck for quite some time

nodes.label: High-quality critical editorial feedback
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to get the point where AI operates as a full editorial partner

nodes.label: Positive appreciation for AI as research catalyst
nodes.grounding_span: AI is a tool, very much like the internet

nodes.label: Ambivalent stance toward AI as editorial checker
nodes.grounding_span: I don't fully trust the model to be sufficiently critical and demanding as an editorial partner

nodes.label: Aspirational hope for AI as practical assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I would love to get the point where AI operates as a full editorial partner

nodes.label: Catalytic ideation — uses AI suggestions to trigger own ideas
nodes.grounding_span: The list of suggestions given essentially rebooted my semantic field and I came up with the perfect description

nodes.label: Logical world-building verification — uses AI to check consistency
nodes.grounding_span: I described their cycles to the model, and used it to determine the frequency of sacred nights
